name: Swim Day 5: Long & Easy
description: Jess: Steady-state endurance swim — longer sets, easy effort. ~35 min, 1800-2000y. Zone out, find your flow, rack up the yards. The meditative one.

exercises.notes: Easy 300 free. No rush. Find your breathing pattern and settle in.
Steady, conversational effort. Breathe every 3 or every 4 — whatever's comfortable. :20 rest between. Just swim.
Pull buoy — let the legs rest. Smooth, easy pulls.
Easy backstroke — different muscles, same chill effort.
Breast with looong glides. Count your strokes per length — try to lower the count.
Sidestroke — the laziest cooldown in swimming.

tips: This is the zen swim — long sets, easy effort, zone out
If 150s feel too long, break them into 100s with :10 rest
Counting strokes per length is a fun game to stay engaged during longer sets
Breathe as often as you need — every 2 is totally fine during pregnancy
